CREATE TABLE xml_test (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, xml_data XML);

CREATE PROCEDURE XMLInsertBefore_test1() { DECLARE ENTITY ent ANY; ent := xpath_eval('//child0', xtree_doc((SELECT xml_data FROM xml_test WHERE id = 1))); XMLInsertBefore(ent, xtree_doc('<child1/>'), xtree_doc('<child2/>')); SELECT xpath_eval('/', ent) AS changed_document; }

CREATE PROCEDURE XMLInsertBefore_test2() { DECLARE ENTITY ent ANY; ent := xpath_eval('//child0', xtree_doc((SELECT xml_data FROM xml_test WHERE id = 1))); XMLInsertBefore(ent, xtree_doc('<child1/>')); SELECT xpath_eval('/', ent) AS changed_document; }

CREATE PROCEDURE XMLInsertBefore_test3() { DECLARE ENTITY ent ANY; ent := xpath_eval('//b/text()', xtree_doc('Content')); XMLInsertBefore(ent, 'Prefix '); SELECT xpath_eval('/', ent) AS changed_document; }

CREATE PROCEDURE XMLInsertBefore_test4() { DECLARE ENTITY ent1 ANY; DECLARE ENTITY ent2 ANY; ent1 := xpath_eval('//child0', xtree_doc((SELECT xml_data FROM xml_test WHERE id = 1))); ent2 := xpath_eval('//child1', xtree_doc('<root><child1/><child2/></root>')); XMLInsertBefore(ent1, ent2); SELECT xpath_eval('/', ent1) AS changed_document; }

CREATE PROCEDURE XMLInsertBefore_test5() { DECLARE ENTITY ent ANY; ent := xpath_eval('//child0', xtree_doc('<root><child0></child0></root>')); XMLInsertBefore(ent, xtree_doc('<child1/>'), xtree_doc('<child2/>'), xtree_doc('<child3/>')); SELECT xpath_eval('/', ent) AS changed_document; }

CREATE PROCEDURE XMLInsertBefore_test6() { DECLARE ENTITY ent ANY; ent := xpath_eval('//child0', xtree_doc('<root><child0></child0></root>')); XMLInsertBefore(ent, xtree_doc('<child1/><child2/><child3/>')); SELECT xpath_eval('/', ent) AS changed_document; }

CREATE PROCEDURE XMLInsertBefore_test7() { DECLARE ENTITY ent ANY; ent := xpath_eval('//b/text()', xtree_doc('original text')); XMLInsertBefore(ent, 'Inserted text '); SELECT xpath_eval('/', ent) AS changed_document; }

CREATE PROCEDURE XMLInsertBefore_test8() { DECLARE ENTITY ent ANY; ent := xpath_eval('//child1', xtree_doc('<root><child1/><child2/><child3/></root>')); XMLInsertBefore(ent, xtree_doc('<child0/>')); SELECT xpath_eval('/', ent) AS changed_document; }
